name: trip_planning
success_criteria: The destination is researched, transport and lodging are booked, an itinerary exists, and travel-document/packing logistics are confirmed ahead of departure.

tasks.title: Research the destination
tasks.description: Research weather, entry/visa requirements, must-see highlights, and local customs for the destination and travel dates.

tasks.title: Book transport
tasks.description: Book flights or other transport to and from the destination for the planned dates.

tasks.title: Book lodging
tasks.description: Book accommodations for each leg of the trip, matching the transport dates.

tasks.title: Plan the itinerary
tasks.description: Draft a day-by-day itinerary balancing travel time, rest, and key activities, confirmed against the transport and lodging dates.

tasks.title: Prepare travel logistics
tasks.description: Confirm passport/visa validity, arrange travel insurance, and build a packing list based on the itinerary and destination.

tasks.title: Final pre-departure check
tasks.description: Confirm all bookings, travel documents, and packing are ready ahead of departure.
